text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
Here is Hishi Amazon, the Queen of the Amazons,
who truly made the Osaka Hai her own!

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
Everyone has been raving about how you ran
gallantly like a warrior!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hehe, now that's a little bit of an exaggeration.

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
We would love to hear some of your thoughts
regarding today's race!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I knew this race would bring in some difficult
competition.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: But that's all the more reason for me to win!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'm ready to push myself past the limit and aim
even higher!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The pre-race interview greatly piques the
audience's interest.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon is raring to go! She was great at the
Osaka Hai!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
"Queen of the Amazons," huh? The title really
suits her!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so the Yasuda Kinen arrives with fan
expectations higher than ever!
